mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.product_subname, p.summary, p.description, p.thumbnail_url, p.status, p.is_featured, p.is_active, p.exposure_start_at, p.exposure_end_at, p.seo_title, p.seo_description, p.view_count, p.video_path, p.video_url, p.travel_type, p.min_people, p.max_people, p.price_per_person, p.transport_type, p.has_shopping, p.has_guide_fee, p.has_escort, p.has_optional_tour, p.departure_location, p.departure_at, p.arrival_location, p.arrival_at, p.hashtags, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( category_id, product_code, product_name, product_subname, summary, description, status, is_featured, is_active, exposure_start_at, exposure_end_at, seo_title, seo_description, travel_type, min_people, max_people, price_per_person, video_path, video_url, transport_type, has_shopping, has_guide_fee, has_escort, has_optional_tour, departure_location, departure_at, arrival_location, arrival_at, hashtags, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productSubname}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{status}, #{isFeatured}, #{isActive}, #{exposureStartAt}, #{exposureEndAt}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{travelType}, #{minPeople}, #{maxPeople}, #{pricePerPerson}, #{videoPath}, #{videoUrl}, #{transportType}, #{hasShopping}, #{hasGuideFee}, #{hasEscort}, #{hasOptionalTour}, #{departureLocation}, #{departureAt}, #{arrivalLocation}, #{arrivalAt}, #{hashtags}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET category_id = #{categoryId}, product_name = #{productName}, product_subname = #{productSubname}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, is_active = #{isActive}, exposure_start_at = #{exposureStartAt}, exposure_end_at = #{exposureEndAt}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, travel_type = #{travelType}, min_people = #{minPeople}, max_people = #{maxPeople}, price_per_person = #{pricePerPerson}, transport_type = #{transportType}, has_shopping = #{hasShopping}, has_guide_fee = #{hasGuideFee}, has_escort = #{hasEscort}, has_optional_tour = #{hasOptionalTour}, departure_location = #{departureLocation}, departure_at = #{departureAt}, arrival_location = #{arrivalLocation}, arrival_at = #{arrivalAt}, hashtags = #{hashtags}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET is_active = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{id} AND is_active = 'Y'
